name: Artius Acquisition Inc.
summary: Artius Acquisition Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company aims to identify and partner with a high-growth business with a strong management team, providing it with capital and expertise to accelerate its growth. Artius Acquisition Inc. is likely based in the United States.
